negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: robot_082
prompt: A time-lapse video showcasing two robotic arms in a minimalist indoor setting. The scene features a light-colored wooden table with a small vase holding pink flowers placed on top, adding a decorative touch. Below the table, a white drawer with a gold handle is partially open, revealing its contents: a black object with the word "PINO" printed on it, a white object with cables attached to it, and a black mouse. Initially, the robotic arm on the left side of the frame, equipped with mechanical hands, moves its hands and then moves closer to the partially opened drawer. The robotic arm on the right side of the frame remains stationary throughout the sequence. The video concludes with the drawer closing slowly, with the objects in the drawer securely placed inside, while the robotic arm on the right side of the frame still remains stationary. The background includes a tiled floor and a green plant in the corner, enhancing the clean and modern aesthetic. A medium shot captures the interaction between the robotic arms and the drawer.
